hook.text: An employee reports harassment. The company has no policy, no process, and no idea what to do next.

buildup.text: Anti-harassment policies define prohibited behavior, reporting procedures, investigation processes, and consequences.

discovery.text: These policies must cover all forms: sexual, racial, disability-based, and bullying—plus retaliation protections.

twist.text: Having a policy isn't enough. Regular training and visible enforcement are what actually change behavior.

climax.text: Companies with strong anti-harassment cultures have higher retention, engagement, and trust.

punchline.text: Policies set the standard. Culture enforces it.
